title: 2026 Golden Globes: Best Supporting Actress Winner
text: Teyana Taylor won Best Film Supporting Actress at the 2026 Golden Globes for her role in One Battle After Another. According to the article, Taylor's win was part of a strong performance by One Battle After Another, which led all films with four total awards. The film also won Best Film Comedy/Musical, Best Director, and Best Screenplay, all going to Paul Thomas Anderson.
